content.rendered:
UMTC is India’s leading urban transport consultancy firm that focuses on developing sustainable urban mobility solutions for urban areas. It is a unique partnership between the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoH&UA), Government of India (GoI), Government of Andhra Pradesh (GoAP), Andhra Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation (APSRTC) and IL&FS IIDC Fund.

Our vision is to Incubate, create, lead and implement socially desirable and financially sustainable outcomes in urban mobility.

We have forged valued partnerships with MoHUA, various state governments, urban local bodies (ULBs), bi & multi-lateral agencies, donor agencies,specialized institutions to develop innovative mobility solution across india and abroad

We are a strong technical team with vast experience in planning, designing, project management and implementation supervision of urban transportation projects
